sentences.text: Hi, this message is for Katrina. This is Alex with our tech please give me a call back at my cell two six nine three one three one five one eight thanks.

You have reached Jan after Alice. If you know your party's extension please enter it at any time. If you need the companies directory enter four one one. If you are responding to an advertisement please enter ten. If you wish to speak to an operator enter zero. If this is an emergency and you need a meeting at response hang up and call eight hundred two four zero six three two for further assistance. You have reached Jan of development Corp. If you know your party's extension please enter it at any time. If you need the companies directory enter four one one. If you are responding to an ad. Welcome to the directory please enter the first three or more letters of the parties first or last name using your touchtone key pad. Trina Brown please hold while we try to connect you to extension three five. You have reached Katrina Brown either on the phone or away from my desk. Please leave a message after the tone. Thank you and have a good day. Please leave your message. After the tone when done hang up or press the pound key.

conversation.title: Call: Alex Wodarczyk and Katrina Brown @ D&F Development Group, LLC
